title: Discordo
description: A simple, yet clean, server-side mod to link Discord and Minecraft.
body:
# Discordo
A simple, yet clean, **server-side** _(not client-side)_ mod to link Discord and Minecraft.

![A conversation between Minecraft and Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fSAB8bAX/images/7312ca28da965673cc71877d930f3ab0d32ee11b.png)

## Features
- Join and leave messages
- Death messages
- Advancements
- Server starting, started, and stopped messages
- Webhook support
